cases.prompt: 출시 한 달 됐는데 PMF 분석 좀 해줘. 활성 사용자 예측이랑 Sean Ellis 점수도.

assertions.text: Simulates the Sean Ellis test with active-user-ratio prediction.

cases.prompt: Project user activity for the next 6 months — give me optimistic/base/pessimistic cases.

assertions.text: Offers an optional periodic reporting mode for post-launch tracking.
